title: Social Networks

vocabulary.meaning: a group of connected people or accounts
the stream of posts shown on a social media page
a written reaction to something posted online
not open for everyone to see

questions: Which social network sites do you use? Which one is your favorite? Why?
How much time do you spend on social networking sites?
What do you think of facebook?
What do you think of twitter?
What do you think of pinterest?
Do you share your photos on social networks?
What are the good things about social networks? What are the bad things?
Do your friends use social networking sites?
Do you think these sites can be addictive? Why?
Have you had any problems on these sites? What were they?
When did you first start using them?
How could you practise your English on these sites?
What annoys you about these sites?
Do you have any friends who annoy you on facebook?
